query: We are a group of 6 people, looking to plan a week-long vacation spanning from March 21st to March 27th, 2022. Our journey will start from Billings, heading towards Arizona with the intent to visit 3 cities in Arizona. Our total budget for the travel plan is $11,700. The accommodations should allow visitors.

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Billings to Flagstaff, duration: 16 hours 29 mins, distance: 1,719 km, cost: 85
plan.attraction: Riordan Mansion State Historic Park;Lowell Observatory;Museum of Northern Arizona;Downtown Flagstaff;Buffalo Park;Flagstaff Area National Monuments;The Arboretum at Flagstaff;Picture Canyon Natural and Cultural Preserve;Wheeler Park;Mountain lion sculpture;Flagstaff Visitor Center;Bushmaster Park;Arizona Snowbowl;Flagstaff Community Labyrinth;Wupatki National Monument;Fort Tuthill Military History Museum;Fatman's Loop Trail;Flagstaff Extreme Adventure Course;Lava River Cave;Pioneer Museum--Arizona Historical Society;
plan.accommodation: Stunning 2 bedroom Apt - Breathtaking views!!, 914.0 Entire home/apt, No visitors & No pets, 30.0, 8, 4.0, Flagstaff
